items.title: The lead lottery
items.hook: Angi sold my lead to 5 other contractors. We're all calling the same person. That's not a lead, that's a lottery.
items.source_signal: Pain bank + TikTok 'Thumbtack leads' complaint content has no brand answering it
items.notes: Real vendor quote, word for word. Yotam films a vendor retelling it. CTA: keep 100% of what you earn.

items.title: What $1,500/month buys you
items.hook: I pay Thumbtack $1,500 a month. You know what converts? Maybe 20%. Here's what I do with that money now.
items.source_signal: Competitor pain bank; Thumbtack's own TikTok gets ~500 views per post despite 32K followers
items.notes: Side-by-side math on screen. Ends with the vendor's real Gozal profile.

items.title: The turnover panic
items.hook: Your cleaner just cancelled. Check-in is at 3. What now?
items.source_signal: ICP C (Carlos) panic moment; STR host communities are priority per approved list
items.notes: Real tension, 30 seconds, phone footage feel. Resolution: found a backup in 60 seconds, no fees.

items.title: Hurricane season prep checklist
items.hook: 6 things to fix before the first storm warning, and which ones actually need a pro.
items.source_signal: Seasonal trigger (South Florida hurricane season, internal targeting only); neighbor-mode value post
items.notes: Zero selling. Gozal mentioned once, naturally, at the end. Copy never names the region.
